title: Reporting APIs
description: Reporting APIs enable merchants to generate actionable reports about various aspects of their business. Through these APIs you gain access to precise data, enabling you to track revenue, monitor transaction volume, identify fraud, reconcile financial records, and make informed decisions for your business.

apis.heading: Fetch Settlement Reports
apis.description: Retrieves the list of settlement reports for a merchant. Use this API to get a summary of the merchant’s settled transactions within a specific time frame, which can be daily or monthly depending on the report type opted for the merchant.

resParams.name: status
resParams.description: Status of the request, indicated as either 'SUCCESS' or 'ERROR'.

resParams.name: payoutId
resParams.description: The payout ID used to identify a specific payout.

resParams.name: merchantId
resParams.description: The merchant ID of the merchant for which the settlement report is generated.

resParams.name: transactionStartDate
resParams.description: The date of the first transaction in the generated settlement report, in YYYY-MM-DD format.

resParams.name: transactionEndDate
resParams.description: The date of the last transaction in the generated settlement report, in YYYY-MM-DD format.

resParams.name: settlementDate
resParams.description: Date of the payout, in YYYY-MM-DD format.

resParams.name: reportType
resParams.description: Specifies the type of settlement report opted for the merchant. It can be either 'MONTHLY' or 'DAILY’.

resParams.name: url
resParams.description: URL from which the particular settlement report can be viewed.

resParams.name: totalSale
resParams.description: The total amount of sales generated by the merchant during the report period.

resParams.name: totalRefund
resParams.description: The total amount refunded by the merchant during the specified time period.

resParams.name: fee
resParams.description: The total fee collected from transactions during the settlement.

resParams.name: payout
resParams.description: The final amount paid out to the merchant after all deductions.

resParams.name: message
resParams.description: A message that describes the status of the request.
